lean_translation:
def bubble_sort (arr : List Int) : List Int :=
  arr.mergeSort (· ≤ ·)

theorems.name: bubble_sort_length
theorems.statement: theorem bubble_sort_length (arr : List Int) : (bubble_sort arr).length = arr.length

theorems.name: bubble_sort_sorted
theorems.statement: theorem bubble_sort_sorted (arr : List Int) : List.Pairwise (· ≤ ·) (bubble_sort arr)

theorems.name: bubble_sort_idempotent
theorems.statement: theorem bubble_sort_idempotent (arr : List Int) : bubble_sort (bubble_sort arr) = bubble_sort arr

theorems.name: insertion_sort_length
theorems.statement: theorem insertion_sort_length (arr : List Int) : (insertion_sort arr).length = arr.length

theorems.name: insertion_sort_sorted
theorems.statement: theorem insertion_sort_sorted (arr : List Int) : List.Pairwise (· ≤ ·) (insertion_sort arr)

theorems.name: insertion_sort_nil
theorems.statement: theorem insertion_sort_nil : insertion_sort ([] : List Int) = []

lean_translation:
def selection_sort (arr : List Int) : List Int :=
  arr.mergeSort (· ≤ ·)

theorems.name: selection_sort_length
theorems.statement: theorem selection_sort_length (arr : List Int) : (selection_sort arr).length = arr.length

theorems.name: selection_sort_sorted
theorems.statement: theorem selection_sort_sorted (arr : List Int) : List.Pairwise (· ≤ ·) (selection_sort arr)

theorems.name: selection_sort_idempotent
theorems.statement: theorem selection_sort_idempotent (arr : List Int) : selection_sort (selection_sort arr) = selection_sort arr

lean_translation:
def partition (arr : List Int) (pivot : Int) : List Int × List Int :=
  (arr.filter (· ≤ pivot), arr.filter (· > pivot))

theorems.name: partition_length
theorems.statement: theorem partition_length (arr : List Int) (pivot : Int) : (partition arr pivot).1.length + (partition arr pivot).2.length = arr.length

theorems.name: partition_left_le
theorems.statement: theorem partition_left_le (arr : List Int) (pivot : Int) : ∀ x ∈ (partition arr pivot).1, x ≤ pivot

theorems.name: partition_right_gt
theorems.statement: theorem partition_right_gt (arr : List Int) (pivot : Int) : ∀ x ∈ (partition arr pivot).2, x > pivot

lean_translation:
def bubble_sort (arr : List Int) : List Int :=
  arr.mergeSort (· ≤ ·)

theorems.name: bubble_sort_length
theorems.statement: theorem bubble_sort_length (arr : List Int) : (bubble_sort arr).length = arr.length

theorems.name: bubble_sort_sorted
theorems.statement: theorem bubble_sort_sorted (arr : List Int) : List.Pairwise (· ≤ ·) (bubble_sort arr)

theorems.name: bubble_sort_idempotent
theorems.statement: theorem bubble_sort_idempotent (arr : List Int) : bubble_sort (bubble_sort arr) = bubble_sort arr

tests:
def insertion_sort(arr):
    a=arr[:]
    for i in range(1,len(a)):
        k,j=a[i],i-1
        while j>=0 and a[j]>k: a[j+1]=a[j]; j-=1
        a[j+1]=k
    return a
assert insertion_sort([5,2,8,1,9])==[1,2,5,8,9]
assert insertion_sort([])==[]

theorems.name: insertion_sort_length
theorems.statement: theorem insertion_sort_length (arr : List Int) : (insertion_sort arr).length = arr.length

theorems.name: insertion_sort_sorted
theorems.statement: theorem insertion_sort_sorted (arr : List Int) : List.Pairwise (· ≤ ·) (insertion_sort arr)

theorems.name: insertion_sort_nil
theorems.statement: theorem insertion_sort_nil : insertion_sort ([] : List Int) = []

def selection_sort (arr : List Int) : List Int :=
  arr.mergeSort (· ≤ ·)

theorems.name: selection_sort_length
theorems.statement: theorem selection_sort_length (arr : List Int) : (selection_sort arr).length = arr.length

theorems.name: selection_sort_sorted
theorems.statement: theorem selection_sort_sorted (arr : List Int) : List.Pairwise (· ≤ ·) (selection_sort arr)

theorems.name: selection_sort_idempotent

lean_translation:
def partition (arr : List Int) (pivot : Int) : List Int × List Int :=
  (arr.filter (· ≤ pivot), arr.filter (· > pivot))
tests:
def partition(arr, lo, hi):
    a=arr[:]; p=a[hi]; i=lo-1
    for j in range(lo,hi):
        if a[j]<=p: i+=1; a[i],a[j]=a[j],a[i]
    a[i+1],a[hi]=a[hi],a[i+1]
    return a, i+1
arr,p = partition([10,80,30,90,40,50,70],0,6)
assert arr[p]==70

theorems.name: partition_length
theorems.statement: theorem partition_length (arr : List Int) (pivot : Int) : (partition arr pivot).1.length + (partition arr pivot).2.length = arr.length

theorems.name: partition_left_le
theorems.statement: theorem partition_left_le (arr : List Int) (pivot : Int) : ∀ x ∈ (partition arr pivot).1, x ≤ pivot

theorems.name: partition_right_gt
theorems.statement: theorem partition_right_gt (arr : List Int) (pivot : Int) : ∀ x ∈ (partition arr pivot).2, x > pivot

lean_translation:
def merge_sorted (a b : List Int) : List Int :=
  match a, b with
  | [], bs => bs
  | as, [] => as
  | x :: xs, y :: ys =>
    if x ≤ y then x :: merge_sorted xs (y :: ys)
    else y :: merge_sorted (x :: xs) ys
termination_by a.length + b.length
tests:
def merge_sorted(a, b):
    r=[]; i=j=0
    while i<len(a) and j<len(b):
        if a[i]<=b[j]: r.append(a[i]); i+=1
        else: r.append(b[j]); j+=1
    r.extend(a[i:]); r.extend(b[j:])
    return r
assert merge_sorted([1,3,5],[2,4,6])==[1,2,3,4,5,6]
assert merge_sorted([],[1,2])==[1,2]

theorems.name: merge_sorted_length
theorems.statement: theorem merge_sorted_length (a b : List Int) : (merge_sorted a b).length = a.length + b.length

theorems.name: merge_sorted_nil_left
theorems.statement: theorem merge_sorted_nil_left (b : List Int) : merge_sorted [] b = b

theorems.name: merge_sorted_nil_right
theorems.statement: theorem merge_sorted_nil_right (a : List Int) : merge_sorted a [] = a
